title: stiptanthus polystachyus
intro: Stiptanthus polystachyus, also known as the prickly poppy or wolf's claw, is a species of flowering plant in the poppy family that is native to the Himalayan region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and analgesic effects, which make it useful for treating a range of health issues, including pain, fever, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Stiptanthus polystachyus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
